children.name:
Error: Either /sitemap.xml or a robots Sitemap: directive required

expect(received).toMatch(expected)

Expected pattern: /sitemap:/i
Received string:  "User-Agent: *
Allow: /·
"
@regression /sitemap.xml exists or is referenced by robots

Error: Unexpected JS errors: Minified React error #418; visit https://react.dev/errors/418?args[]=HTML&args[]= for the full message or use the non-minified dev environment for full errors and additional helpful warnings.

expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality

- Expected  - 1
+ Received  + 3

- Array []
+ Array [
+   "Minified React error #418; visit https://react.dev/errors/418?args[]=HTML&args[]= for the full message or use the non-minified dev environment for full errors and additional helpful warnings.",
+ ]
@regression no critical JavaScript errors thrown during load

expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality

+ Received  + 8

- Array []

+ ]
